basic_details.job_title: SMFCL Executives Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 12 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Sagarmala Finance Corporation Limited (SMFCL), Mini Ratna Category‑I CPSE, Ministry of Ports, Shipping and Waterways, Government of India
basic_details.post_name: Executive (E‑1 Grade) – Finance, Projects, Legal, Company Secretary, IT
basic_details.department: Registered Office: 1st Floor, 124, Thapar House, Janpath Lane, New Delhi – 110001
basic_details.total_vacancies: 12 posts (including reserved posts for SC/ST/OBC‑NCL/EWS and 01 PwBD post)
basic_details.short_information: The Sagarmala Finance Corporation Limited (SMFCL), formerly known as Sagarmala Development Company Limited, a Mini Ratna Category-I CPSE under the Ministry of Ports, Shipping and Waterways, Government of India, has released SMFCL Rectt. Advt. No. 01/2026 dated 20-05-2026 for Executive (E-1 Grade) posts in Finance, Projects, Legal, Company Secretary, and IT disciplines. A total of 12 vacancies have been announced through the SMFCL Executive Recruitment 2026.

important_dates.tentative date for computer based test (: July 2026 (exact date to be intimated in Admit Card)
important_dates.interview_date: To be notified later on SMFCL website / email

application_fee.general_fee: Rs. 1,000/- (One Thousand only) including taxes, non‑refundable.
application_fee.sc_fee: Nil – exempted from payment of fee subject to uploading valid certificate.
application_fee.details: Candidates are required to pay the prescribed non‑refundable application fee through online mode only at the time of submission of the application; applications without successful fee payment (where applicable) will be treated as incomplete and rejected. The fee once paid will neither be refunded nor adjusted against any other recruitment.

age_limit.age_details: 30 years as on last date of application (with relaxations for reserved categories)
age_limit.details: The upper age limit for all Executive posts is 30 years as on the last date of online application, i.e. 18-06-2026. Relaxation in upper age limit will be admissible to reserved category candidates as per Government of India norms subject to submission of valid supporting documents.

qualification.education_qualification: Executive (Finance): CA / CMA. Executive (Projects): B.E./B.Tech in Civil / Electrical / Electrical & Electronics / Electronics & Communications / Electronics / Mechanical with minimum 60% marks. Executive (Legal): Full‑time LL.B (3 years) with first division or equivalent CGPA OR 5‑year integrated Law degree with first division or equivalent CGPA. Executive (Company Secretary): Graduate with Associate/Fellow Membership of ICSI. Executive (IT): B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science with minimum 60% marks.
qualification.experience: Proof of each period of experience claimed must be uploaded in a single PDF in chronological order (offer letters, joining orders, relieving letters, service certificates, relevant pay slips, etc.).
qualification.nationality: Applicants should be of sound character; persons convicted of an offence involving moral turpitude will not be eligible.
qualification.details: Candidates must satisfy all eligibility conditions including age, qualification and experience as on the last date of online application (18-06-2026). All educational qualifications must be from Indian Universities/Institutes recognized by UGC/AICTE or appropriate statutory authorities and candidates must possess final year pass results at the time of submitting the online application.

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: CA / CMA from a recognized institute.
B.E./B.Tech in Civil / Electrical / Electrical & Electronics / Electronics & Communications / Electronics / Mechanical Engineering with minimum 60% marks from a recognized institution.
Regular full-time Degree in Law (LL.B – 3 years) with first division or equivalent CGPA OR 5‑year integrated Law course with first division or equivalent CGPA from a recognized University.
Graduate with Associate / Fellow Membership of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI).
B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science from recognized institutions/universities with minimum 60% marks.

vacancy_details.Category-wise Breakup: Including 01 post reserved for PwBD across the above disciplines.

vacancy_details.Suitable Categories of Disability: D, HH, OL, OA, BL, OAL, LC, Dw, AAV, SLD, MD involving (b to d except D and SLD).
D, HH, OL, OA, LC, Dw, AAV, SLD, MD involving (b to d except D and SLD).
LV, OL, BL, OAL, LC, CP, Dw, AAV, MD involving (a and c except D and LV).
HH, OL, OA, BL, OAL, LC, Dw, AAV, ASD, SLD, MD involving (b to d except SLD).
B, LV, D, HH, OL, OA, BL, LC, Dw, AAV, MDy, MD involving (a to c).

salary_details.pay_scale: E‑1 Grade: Rs. 40,000 – 1,40,000/- (IDA) plus DA, perks and other benefits as per company rules

selection_process: Sl. Name of Test No. of Questions Maximum Marks Duration Medium of Test
1 MCQs related to Specific Domain / Discipline 90 90 2 hours (composite) English & Hindi.
2 General Aptitude (General English, Quantitative Aptitude, Reasoning, General Awareness) 60 (15+15+15+15) 60 English & Hindi (General English in English only).
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply only through online mode; no other form of application will be accepted. Before applying, candidates should ensure that they fulfil the eligibility conditions and have all necessary documents scanned in the required formats for upload.
Visit the official website of SMFCL at http://www.sdclindia.com and open the “Careers” section.
Click on the link for SMFCL Rectt. Advt. No. 01/2026 and read the detailed advertisement and instructions carefully.
important_instructions: The cut‑off date for determining age, qualification and post‑qualification experience is 18.06.2026; any qualification or experience acquired after this date will not be considered. Mere submission of application does not guarantee shortlisting; candidates must meet all eligibility criteria and clear the selection stages. If at any stage it is found that a candidate has furnished incorrect/false information or suppressed any material fact, his/her candidature/appointment is liable to be cancelled/terminated without notice. If a candidate applies for more than one post and CBT for multiple posts is held in a single session, he/she will be allowed to appear in CBT for only one post/discipline; remaining applications will not be considered and fee will not be refunded. Change of category, post, city for CBT, email ID, or any key information after submission of online application will not be entertained. All communication will be made only through email and SMFCL website; candidates must keep their registered email ID active for at least one year. Selected candidates can be posted anywhere in SMFCL offices or its subsidiaries in India or abroad as per organizational requirements. SMFCL reserves the right to cancel, restrict or modify the recruitment process or number of vacancies at any stage without assigning any reason. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature. In case of any dispute, only courts at Delhi shall have jurisdiction; in case of discrepancy between versions, the English version of the advertisement will prevail.
